title: runtime error: index out of range [0] with length 0 by `RAND()`
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

```sql
CREATE  TABLE  t0(c0 INTEGER); 
CREATE VIEW v0(c0) AS SELECT 'a' FROM t0 WHERE (CASE t0.c0 WHEN t0.c0 THEN false END );

SELECT t0.c0 FROM v0, t0 WHERE RAND();
```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
No error.

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
```
ERROR 1105 (HY000): runtime error: index out of range [0] with length 0
```
and server log:

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INT, c2 VARCHAR(10), c3 FLOAT DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2) VALUES (1, 'test'), (2, 'example'), (3, NULL);

key_bug_features: SELECT from view with RAND() on empty table
